statement: In every magma, Equation 553 (`x = y * (z * (x * (w * u)))`) implies Equation 3702 (`x * x = (y * z) * (z * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0940
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op x (op w u))))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x x) = (op (op y z) (op z x))
